entries.note:
Initial autoresearch harness with naive O(N²) schoolbook negacyclic polynomial
multiplication in `Z[X]/(X^1024+1)` with `u32` wrapping coefficients. `Plan` is a
placeholder; all work happens in `poly_mul`.
